chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-849 of 2023 (Zaffar Iqbal Arain Vs. The State & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on MA No. 7165/2023 (U/A). 2. For Orders on office objection. 3. For Orders on MA No. 7166/2023 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For Orders on MA No. 7167/2023 (Stay) 27-11-2023. Syed Naimat Ali Shah advocate for the applicant. ******** 1. Granted. 2. Over ruled. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4&5. The facts in brief necessary for disposal of instant Crl. Misc. Application are that the direct complaint filed by the private respondent was dismissed u/s 203 Cr.P.C by learned IInd Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate, Sukkur, such dismissal was impugned by him by preferring a Cr. Revision Application, whereby impugned order was set aside with direction to learned trial Magistrate to pass the same afresh by learned Sessions Judge, Sukkur vide order dated 27-09-2023, which is impugned by the applicant before this Court. On asking, it was stated by learned counsel for the applicant that the applicant has joined the trial. If it is so, then the applicant has an ample opportunity to prove his innocence at trial and/or seek his premature acquittal by making such application before learned trial Court. No illegality is evident which may justify this Court to make interference with the impugned order by way of instant Crl. Misc. Application; it is dismissed in limine together with listed application. Judge Nasim/P.A 2
